CheckTitle: Security group restricts Oracle Database access from the internet
Description: Checks that Oracle Database TCP ports 1521 and 2483 are not exposed to unrestricted IPv4 (`0.0.0.0/0`) or IPv6 (`::/0`) sources.
Risk: Public Oracle Database access enables credential attacks and vulnerability exploitation, risking unauthorized data access and service disruption.

Code.Other: Inspect inbound rules in the ECS console. Locate effective Accept rules from `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0` using TCP or ALL whose actual port range contains Oracle Database ports `1521` or `2483`. Restrict the source or range, or revoke the exact rule by SecurityGroupRuleId. Revocation using protocol/range/source must exactly match the existing rule.

Recommendation.Text: Do not expose TCP ports 1521 or 2483 to `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
